{{Quote|Halt! You there! Don't move!|A clone trooper after spotting movement behind a Hylaian marsh bamboo|audio=Clone-Halt-ROTSn.flac|<ref name="ROTS novel" />}}
'''Hylaian marsh bamboo''' was a [[Bamboo/Legends|bamboo]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]]<ref name="ROTS novel" /> from the [[Hylaia system/Legends|Hylaia system]]<ref name="Planetnamia" /> in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="Rim">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> The plant was grown in the [[Room of a Thousand Fountains/Legends|Room of a Thousand Fountains]],<ref name="ROTS novel" /> a greenhouse at the base<ref name="Locations">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref> of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="ROTS novel" /> In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the events of the [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> following the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|destruction]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], the Temple was occupied by [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] who were tasked with cleaning up and identifying the many [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Death/Legends|corpses]].<ref name="ROTS novel" />

In the Room of a Thousand Fountains, one [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] spotted movement behind a stand of Hylaian [[Swamp/Legends|marsh]] bamboo and ordered the perpetrator to remain still. The figure ran out of the room and the clone directed his [[Squad/Legends|squadmates]] to pursue it. However, the moving figure had actually been a illusion by the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], who were then able to enter the freshly unoccupied room and continue their [[Infiltration of the Jedi Temple/Legends|investigation]] into the Jedi deaths.<ref name="ROTS novel" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Hylaian marsh bamboo first appeared in [[Matthew Stover]]'s [[2005]] [[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|novelization]] of the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].<ref name="ROTS novel" />
